highlights: Replaced scattered admin tools with a unified Settings Hub that groups General Settings, Analytics, and Data Editors.
Added a dedicated Emotions editor with sorting, live search, and JSON or CSV import and export support.
Expanded the mood system to a 10-point scale with updated emoji display, hover tooltips, and calibrated XP multipliers.
Added local browser reminders plus fast in-place filtering for Feelings and Actions without breaking focus or flow.
Polished the day-to-day interface with accordion layouts, quest card spacing, and stronger mobile behavior on smaller screens.
